sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, text_value VARCHAR(255), time_value TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_value, time_value) VALUES (1, 'TestString1', time(3) with time zone '10:15:30.123+05:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_value, time_value) VALUES (2, 'SecondEntry', time(3) with time zone '23:59:59.999-05:00');
SELECT id, lcase(text_value) AS lower_case_text, time_value FROM test_table WHERE time_value IS NOT NULL AND lcase(text_value) LIKE 'test%';
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, lcase(text_value) AS lower_case_text FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL) AS sub WHERE lower_case_text = 'secondentry';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE time_value > time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000+00:00';
SELECT MAX(lcase(text_value)), MIN(time_value) FROM test_table GROUP BY lcase(text_value) HAVING MIN(time_value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT lcase(t1.text_value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id != t2.id WHERE lcase(t1.text_value) = lcase(t2.text_value);
SELECT lcase(STRING_AGG(text_value, ', ')) AS aggregated FROM test_table WHERE time_value < time(3) with time zone '15:00:00.000+02:00';
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, lcase(text_value) AS lower_case_text FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, lcase(text_value) FROM test_table WHERE time_value IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE lower_case_text IS NOT NULL AND lower_case_text like 'test%';
UPDATE test_table SET time_value = time(3) with time zone '00:00:00.000+00:00' WHERE id = 1 AND text_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT lcase(text_value) AS lower_case_text FROM test_table WHERE lcase(text_value) = '' OR time_value IS NULL;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table t1 CROSS JOIN test_table t2 ON lcase(t1.text_value) = lcase(t2.text_value) WHERE t1.id != t2.id;
